''[[Avengers: Endgame: The Pirate Angel, The Talking Tree, and Captain Rabbit]]'' |actor = [[Dave Bautista]] |voice actor = [[Fred Tatasciore]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|You weren't born to be a destroyer, you were born to be a dad.|[[Nebula]] to Drax|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} '''Drax''' is an intergalactic criminal and a former member of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]]. He sought revenge on [[Ronan the Accuser]] for [[Massacre of Drax's Species|killing]] his [[Ovette|wife]] and [[Kamaria|daughter]], and went on a rampage across the galaxy, ending with him becoming known as '''Drax the Destroyer''', and being imprisoned by the [[Nova Corps]] in the [[Kyln]]. There, Drax became uneasy allies with [[Star-Lord]], [[Gamora]], [[Rocket]], and [[Groot (Original)|Groot]]. Together, they broke out of the Kyln and became embroiled in the [[Quest for the Orb]]. After the [[Battle of Xandar]], in which he finally exacted his vengeance on Ronan, Drax left [[Xandar]] with the other Guardians but not before declaring [[Thanos]] as his next target. Following the Guardians, Drax assisted in killing the [[Abilisk]] for the [[Sovereign]] people, only for Rocket to betray them. Drax followed the Guardians as they encountered [[Ego]], the long-lost father of Star-Lord. Along the way, he developed a close bond with [[Mantis]], who soon revealed that Ego's [[Ego's Expansion|true plan]] was to destroy and rebuild the entire universe. Drax and his fellow Guardians [[Battle on Ego's Planet|defeated]] Ego, saving the galaxy once more but at the cost of [[Yondu Udonta]]'s self-sacrifice. [[2018|Four years later]], the Guardians of the Galaxy joined up with [[Thor]] and the [[Avengers]] in trying to stop Thanos from obtaining the [[Infinity Stones]]. When Thanos gathered all of the stones, he used them to eradicate half the universe's population, including Drax and the Guardians, except Rocket and [[Nebula]]. [[2023|Five years after]] the [[Snap]], the remaining Avengers successfully gathered the Infinity Stones from different points in the past and [[Hulk]] [[Blip|resurrected]] the victims of the Snap, restoring Drax back to life. He then participated and survived the [[Battle of Earth]], attended [[Tony Stark]]'s funeral, and rejoined the Guardians of the Galaxy. Drax continued to defend the Galaxy with his team, on missions including the [[Battle of Indigarr]]. After Thor left the group, Drax and the other Guardians aided planets who had their gods killed by [[Gorr the God Butcher]]. Eventually, Drax joined the group in rebuilding [[Knowhere]] and establishing it as their new headquarters. To make Star-Lord happy, Drax and [[Mantis]] went to Earth to abduct [[Kevin Bacon]] as a Christmas present, much to Star-Lord’s disdain. Their spirits changed once Bacon agreed to celebrate Christmas at Knowhere, bringing joy to Star-Lord all the same. Drax joined the Guardians in thwarting an attempt made by [[Adam Warlock]] on the orders of the [[High Evolutionary]] to abduct Rocket. The Guardians discovered a kill switch embedded in Rocket preventing them from treating his wounds, leading them on a mission to retrieve the override code, venturing first to the [[Orgoscope]] and then [[Counter-Earth]]. After saving Rocket, the team mounted a mission to liberate the High Evolutionary’s imprisoned test subjects from [[Arête Laboratories]], overwhelming waves of [[Hell Spawn]] and defeating the High Evolutionary, before Drax personally saved his life and took him into custody. Drax opted to leave the Guardians in order to help raise the rescued [[Star Children]] on Knowhere, having reignited his passion for parenting upon encountering them. ==Biography== ===Early Life=== ====Forming a Family==== {{Quote|I first met my beloved at a war rally, everyone in the village flailed about dancing except one woman, my [[Ovette]]. I knew immediately she was the one for me.|Drax to [[Star-Lord]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2}} Drax came from a planet which has a mountain called [[Mount Kylos]] with his people, a race of primitives who are considered naïve and hopelessly underdeveloped by the more advanced galactic groups. As a result, Drax is extremely unaware of basic concepts such as metaphors and customs. They are, however, a fierce and capable warrior race who follow a tribal-like culture.{{Ref|GotG}} During his youth, Drax's father would tell the story of the night he had impregnated Drax's mother with him, something Drax found beautiful.{{Ref|GotGV2}} Drax's cousin was brutally killed by a rogue [[GoBots|GoBot]] causing Drax to develop a hatred towards the transforming robots.{{Ref|TGotGHS}}[https://twitter.com/JamesGunn/status/1597030556495056898?cxt=HHwWhMCo9Yy15aksAAAA James Gunn on Twitter - November 27, 2022] While attending a war rally with his people, Drax met a woman named [[Ovette]], falling in love with her due to her lack of joy at the festivities, and together had a daughter named [[Kamaria]].{{Ref|GotGV2}} ===Quest for Vengeance=== ====Hunting Ronan the Accuser==== [[File:PHESjzPzPIwlIL 1 m.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax the Destroyer is imprisoned in the [[Kyln]]]] {{Quote|[[Ronan]] murdered my wife, [[Ovette]], and my daughter, [[Kamaria]]. He slaughtered them where they stood. And he laughed!|Drax the Destroyer to [[Moloka Dar]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} Under the order of the warlord [[Thanos]], [[Ronan the Accuser]] randomly divided Drax's species into two parts, and one of them was slaughtered. Drax was put on the side which survived, but [[Ovette]] and [[Kamaria]] were murdered with the rest.{{Ref|AIWDC}} Drax was driven into a path of vengeance and went on a bloody rampage across the galaxy in search of the murderous [[Kree]], gaining a reputation as one of the most dangerous beings in the galaxy and earning the nickname, ''The Destroyer''. After over twenty-two counts of murder and five counts of grievous bodily harm, he was arrested by the [[Nova Corps]] and brought to the [[Kyln]].{{Ref|GotG}} ====Meeting the Guardians==== [[File:Drax-FirstLook.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax learns [[Gamora]] has arrived at the [[Kyln]]]] {{Quote|He killed my family, I shall kill one of his in return."
"I'm no family to [[Ronan]] or [[Thanos]]. I'm your only hope at stopping him."
"Woman! Your words mean nothing to me!|Drax and [[Gamora]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} As Drax served his sentence in the [[Kyln]], he witnessed the arrival of [[Gamora]], the adopted daughter of [[Thanos]] and who had been working for [[Ronan the Accuser]]. As Gamora was threatened by the other inmates, many of whom had lost their own families to Ronan's wars, Drax sat quietly and waited for the right moment to gain his revenge and kill Gamora in order to hurt Ronan. [[File:Drax-confronts-Gamora-shadows.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax finding both [[Moloka Dar]] and [[Gamora]]]] That night, Drax found [[Moloka Dar]] dragging Gamora into the shower rooms with some other inmates with the intention of cutting her throat. Drax, however, appeared and warned them all to stop what they were doing, making it clear how Ronan had murdered both [[Ovette]] and [[Kamaria]] and therefore he felt he was the one who had to kill Gamora. Dar was clearly terrified of Drax and willingly handed over his own knife to the destroyer to then kill Gamora. [[File:Drax-Attacks-Gamora.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax preparing to execute [[Gamora]]]] Drax explained that as Ronan had killed his family, he intended to kill one of Ronan's daughters. Gamora, however, disarmed Drax and Dar, killing another inmate and threatening them both while noting that she was no daughter of either Thanos or Ronan and in fact was the only hope of stopping them. Drax ignored Gamora's claims and gripped her by the throat, insisting that this changed nothing as he prepared to violently kill her to gain some satisfaction. [[File:Drax-ILikeYourKnife.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax reluctantly accepting [[Star-Lord]]'s idea]] Before Drax could have his revenge, he was interrupted by [[Star-Lord]] and [[Rocket]], who insisted that Drax keep Gamora alive in order to draw Ronan to the [[Kyln]] where he could destroy the man who killed his family. Despite some miscommunication, Drax eventually agreed that this was the best plan and reluctantly freed Gamora from his grasp. Before he departed to return to his cell, Drax informed Dar he was now keeping the knife for himself.{{Ref|GotG}} ====Prison Break==== [[File:Drax in Prison.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax witnesses the prison riot breaking out]] {{Quote|Cease your yammering and relieve us from this irksome confinement."
"Yeah, I'll have to agree with the walking thesaurus on that one."
"Do not ever call me a thesaurus.|Drax and [[Star-Lord]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} The next day, Drax witnessed [[Groot (Original)|Groot]] stealing a Quardrix battery from the middle of the [[Kyln]], which almost immediately caused the entire prison to go straight into emergency mode and the guards to rush in to pacify the inmates. As Drax stood by and watched, Groot grew to an incredible size and [[Escape from the Kyln|battled]] against the security hoverbots, with [[Rocket]] on his back, while chastising him over his foolish actions. When Drax saw the guards preparing to shoot at Rocket Raccoon and Groot, Drax had then made the split second decision that he would assist them so he could also escape from the Kyln. [[File:Drax2.PNG|{{AltFloat}}|Drax eager to fight during the sudden escape from the [[Kyln]]]] Drax fought a number of guards and easily knocked all of them out, laughing hysterically as he did as he had enjoyed the sense of battle. Once the guards were defeated, Drax threw a machine gun to Rocket who used it to shoot at the [[Kyln Hoverbots|hoverbots]]. Drax later assisted [[Peter Quill]] by ripping a security drone apart with his bare hands, before he called out Quill for his story of sleeping with an [[A'askavariians|A'askavariian]] while he climbed up the side of Groot to finally escape from the prison. [[File:DraxGamoraGroot-ExplosionLight.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax awaits [[Rocket]]'s escape plan]] The five prisoners locked themselves in the security watchtower, leading to a confrontation between Drax and [[Gamora]], who was horrified that Drax was with them while Rocket mocked their new teammate for his lack of understanding of metaphors. Rocket then initiated his plan. He switched off the prison's artificial gravity, took control of the hoverbots and used them to propel the watchtower room out of the cell block to make their escape. [[File:Guardians Of The Galaxy KLX0290 comp v053 grade.1083.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax watching [[Star-Lord]] flying through space]] Once they reclaimed their belongings, the group was ordered to wait in Star-Lord's spaceship while he completed one final task. As they waited in the ''[[Milano]]'' for Quill, Gamora realized that he had taken the [[Orb]] with him and therefore they could not leave without him. While Rocket panicked that soon the [[Nova Corps]] would arrive and shoot them out of the sky, Drax looked out of the window and was the first to see Quill coming towards them, using [[Star-Lord's Helmet|his helmet]] to keep him alive as he jetted through space with his boots and rejoined the others. [[File:Drax-YoureAnImbecile.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax rudely calling [[Star-Lord]] an imbecile]] Drax was greatly impressed by Quill's bravery in successfully fighting off the Nova Corps guards and having returned to the ship in such spectacular style, complimenting his new ally while pulling him in. Drax questioned what had made Quill depart on his brief mission, but was horrified when he discovered that Quill was simply retrieving his [[Star-Lord's Walkman|Walkman]], looking up at Quill and calling him an imbecile for risking his life for something so minor.{{Ref|GotG}} ====Joining the Team==== [[File:Guardians-of-the-galaxy-movie-imagedraxgamora.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax, [[Gamora]] and [[Peter Quill]] discuss the [[Orb]]]] {{Quote|If [[Orb|it]]'s a weapon, we should use it against [[Ronan]]."
"Put it down, you fool! You'll destroy us all."
"Or just you, murderess!|Drax and [[Gamora]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} While traveling in the ''[[Milano]]'', the team discussed their next move and who they intended to sell the [[Orb]] to. Drax suggested that if it was a weapon they should’ve used it to kill [[Ronan the Accuser]] which led to an argument between him and [[Gamora]]. Before they could begin fighting, [[Peter Quill]] broke them apart and suggested that they concentrate on getting paid, to which Drax claimed to have no interest in money as it did not help him in his goal to kill Ronan. [[File:DraxArrivesAtKnowhere.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax overlooks [[Knowhere]] as they arrive]] Drax and the rest of the group traveled to [[Knowhere]] to deliver the Orb to [[Taneleer Tivan]], to whom Gamora had agreed to sell the Orb. As they approached the city, Drax was amazed by the incredible structure, which Gamora explained had been built out of the severed head of an ancient [[Celestials|celestial being]] and warning that the people there were not to be trusted. While walking about, Drax and Quill discussed [[Earth]], with Drax noting he would’ve liked to visit. [[File:Drax and Goot Bar.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax gets drunk and bets on [[Orloni]] fights]] While they waited for Tivan; Drax, [[Rocket]] and [[Groot (Original)|Groot]] went to the nearby [[Boot of Jemiah]], where both Drax and Rocket ended up getting drunk and betting on some [[Orloni]] fights. For a while, Drax and Rocket appeared to get along and even shared laughs together.{{Ref|GotG}} Taking a break from the drinking and laughing, Drax explained the stories behind his many markings on his skin. However, this eventually led to the pair beginning an argument about mourning.{{Ref|GotGDS}} [[File:Drax-Gamora-After-Fight-Knowhere.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax and [[Rocket]] attack each other]] Their argument soon led to Drax and Rocket getting into a fight after Drax insulted Rocket's rodent-like appearance. Groot tried to help Rocket, but Drax attacked him and pinned him down where he proceeded hit him repeatedly, prompting Rocket to draw a [[Laser Cannon]] and prepare to shoot Drax with it. Luckily, Quill came and stopped the drunken Rocket, convincing him to let it slide until they had gotten their money. In a rage, Drax left the bar. After he left, the rest of the group was finally summoned by Tivan. [[File:Drax-DrunkKnowhere.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax decides to contact [[Ronan the Accuser]]]] While stalking through Knowhere in frustration at his team's inability to work together for his goal of destroying [[Ronan the Accuser]], Drax looked down the street and came across [[Steemie Blueliver]] at the [[Tivan Dispatch Center]]. Sneaking up on Steemie while he was ordering supplies, Drax threatened to cut off his head with [[Drax the Destroyer's Knives|twin blades]] and forced him to call Ronan and bring him to Knowhere so that he could kill him and finally avenge his family.{{Ref|GotG}} ===Showdown with Ronan=== ====[[Skirmish on Knowhere]]==== [[File:108kmg ons inl 01.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax challenges [[Ronan the Accuser]]]] {{Quote|Ronan the Accuser!"
"You are the one who transmitted the message?"
"You killed my [[Ovette|wife]]! You killed my [[Kamaria|daughter]]!|Drax and [[Ronan]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} While the rest of the group discovered that inside the [[Orb]] was one of the [[Infinity Stones]] powerful enough to destroy a planet, Drax got his [[Drax the Destroyer's Knives|knives]] ready as [[Ronan the Accuser]] arrived, prepared to destroy his enemy. While Drax confronted Ronan about the murder of his [[Ovette|wife]] and [[Kamaria|daughter]] and his desire for revenge, he intended to gain by killing Ronan. [[File:Drax-vs-Ronan-GotG.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax battles against [[Ronan the Accuser]]]] Although Ronan attempted to just walk away, not seeing Drax as a worthy opponent, Drax refused to allow his enemy to get away and charged at him, with Ronan very casually dodging Drax's blows while he continued giving his orders to [[Nebula]] to reclaim the [[Orb]] from Drax's allies who were attempting to escape. Despite all of Drax's attempts to kill the far stronger [[Kree]] soldier, Ronan the Accuser was able to overpower Drax, throwing him around with ease. [[File:Drax-Battle-Chocked-Ronan.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax is defeated by [[Ronan the Accuser]]]] Despite all of Drax's efforts as he pounded at Ronan's [[Kree Armor]], he was unable to do any notable damage to his foe, who was able to finally [[Skirmish on Knowhere|overpower and defeat]] Drax, choking him and throwing his body to the ground with minimal effort. Ronan dismissed Drax's claims of murdering his family, claiming he did not remember them and would not remember killing him either, with Drax now too beaten and weak to even stand and defend his family's honor. [[File:DraxSavedFromDrowning.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax is saved from drowning by [[Groot]]]] Once Drax had been easily subdued by Ronan with little effort, he was dragged across the street by his foot before being thrown into a tank full of spinal fluid from the [[Celestial]] and left to die, all while Ronan calmly returned to a [[Necrocraft]] which took him back to the ''[[Dark Aster]]'' as Nebula had reclaimed the Orb from Gamora. Drax nearly drowned in the tank, but [[Groot (Original)|Groot]] pulled him out just in time and resuscitated him by stabbing Drax in the chest. [[File:Guardians Of The Galaxy NPS5265 comp v101 grade.1074.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax agrees to save [[Star-Lord]] and [[Gamora]]]] Outside of [[Knowhere]], Gamora was nearly killed by Nebula, and the Orb was retaken by Ronan. [[Peter Quill]] summoned the [[Yondu Ravager Clan]] to assist, and they ended up capturing him and [[Gamora]]. Drax was blamed by [[Rocket]] for Quill and Gamora's kidnapping, and Drax realized that he used anger just to hide his pain. However, he got no sympathy from Rocket, who intended to escape to the other side of the galaxy to avoid Ronan's wrath. Drax, however, stood by Groot and chose to rescue Quill and Gamora.{{Ref|GotG}} ====Rescuing Peter Quill==== [[File:Hadron Enforcer Drax1.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax prepares to use the [[Hadron Enforcer]]]] {{Quote|You're an honorable man, Quill. I will fight beside you. And in the end, I will see my [[Ovette|wife]] and [[Kamaria|daughter]] again.|Drax to [[Peter Quill]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} Hoping to save [[Star-Lord]] and [[Gamora]], the three flew to the ''[[Eclector]]'' in the ''[[Milano]]'', planning to destroy the [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravagers]]' ship with the [[Hadron Enforcer]] if they did not hand over Quill and Gamora in five seconds. Right before they were going to destroy the ship, Quill used the Ravagers' communication system to tell [[Rocket]] that he had managed to come up with a deal for [[Yondu Udonta]]. [[File:Drax-IWasThinkingOfSomethingElse.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax discusses their plan to get the [[Orb]]]] With Quill and Gamora back on the ship, they began discussing what their next move would be in order to get the [[Orb]] back. When Drax attempted to make a comment, Gamora told him not to speak after the disaster he caused on [[Knowhere]] by calling [[Ronan the Accuser]] in order to try and [[Skirmish on Knowhere|battle]] him. When Drax argued he should’ve got credit for saving Quill, he was reminded that his attempt to save him had involved threatening to blow up the ship he was on. [[File:Drax-IWillFightBesideYou.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax agreeing to join [[Peter Quill]] into battle]] Eventually, Quill pitched his plan to attack the ''[[Dark Aster]]'', kill [[Ronan the Accuser]] and take back the [[Orb]], although the plan seemed like a suicide mission, Drax stood by Quill and vowed to fight with him, noting that once the battle was over and they had all been killed, he would be reunited with his [[Ovette|wife]] and [[Kamaria|daughter]], leading to all the other [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] standing with him and agreeing to fight in order to save [[Xandar]] and defeat Ronan once and for all. [[File:Drax-Yondu-GOTG.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax joins with [[Yondu Udonta]]'s [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravagers]]]] The team soon went back to the Ravagers' ship to discuss the details of the plan with Udonta and his men. When [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] noted that there would be hundreds of [[Sakaarans]] on board the ship willing to fight for Ronan, Drax noted that he viewed the Sakaarans as nothing more than paper people. This pleased Obfonteri who punched Drax in the shoulder, which caused Drax to look at him in rage. [[File:Drax-ChoosingClothes.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax prepares for their upcoming battles]] With the plan ready to go into action, Drax put on his new uniform and readied [[Drax the Destroyer's Knives|his knives]] to go into battle with his friends in order to save [[Xandar]] from almost certain destruction at the hands of Ronan and his army, with Drax joining Quill, Gamora and Groot on board the ''Milano'' which would board the ''Dark Aster'' in order to confront Ronan while Rocket had his own ship and led the Ravagers in the upcoming aerial battle against the army of Sakaaran soldiers.{{Ref|GotG}} ====[[Battle of Xandar]]==== [[File:Drax-BattleOfXandar-Flying.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax flies into the battle with his new allies]] {{Quote|This [[Groot|dumb tree]], he is my friend. And this green whore, she, too–"
"Oh, you must stop!|Drax and [[Gamora]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} The next day, [[Star-Lord]]'s team and the [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravagers]] put the plan into action and Quill warned [[Rhomann Dey]] so that he could tell the rest of the [[Nova Corps]]. As the battle began, Drax rode with Quill, [[Gamora]] and [[Groot (Original)|Groot]] towards the ''[[Dark Aster]]''. However, they were quickly attacked by swarms of [[Necrocraft]] sent by [[Ronan the Accuser]], who overwhelmed them, even managing to shoot [[Yondu Udonta]]'s battleship out of the sky. [[File:Drax-YES-GOTG.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax celebrates as he flies into battle]] Just before they could all be destroyed, however, the Nova Corps arrived, led by [[Garthan Saal]] under the orders of [[Irani Rael]]. While Saal and [[Rocket]] kept Ronan's entire army at bay with the aid of the Ravagers, Star-Lord flew the ''[[Milano]]'' onto the ''[[Dark Aster]]'' through a hole blasted in by Rocket. As they crash-landed into the ship, Drax could not hold back his glee and cheered with delight as Quill used the ships' guns to kill dozens of the [[Sakaarans]] inside. [[File:Drax-FairyLights.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax apologizes for his more recent mistakes]] Once they landed and left the crashed ship, they discovered that the ''Dark Aster'' was too dark for them to see so [[Groot]] used his powers to create a strange light across the ship to show them the way. When Drax questioned how he could do it, Star-Lord noted the answer would have likely been "I am Groot." As they made their way across the ship, Drax apologized to the group for his [[Skirmish on Knowhere|past mistakes]] and expressed his gratitude at having their new found friendship. [[File:Guardians-Drax-shoots-Nebula.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax shoots [[Nebula]] for dishonoring his allies]] They were suddenly stopped by [[Nebula]] who attempted to kill the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]], as she cursed at [[Gamora]] for betraying Ronan and [[Thanos]], Drax shot her with his rocket launcher, claiming no-one should speak to his friends like that. With the threat of Nebula seemingly dealt with the team, they split up: with Gamora going to unlock the security doors while Drax, Star-Lord and Groot made their way through the Sakaaran army towards Ronan's location.{{Ref|GotG}} ====Skirmish with Korath==== [[File:Draxwith2blades.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax battles [[Sakaaran]] soldiers]] {{Quote|Finger to the throat means death. Metaphor.|Drax to [[Korath]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} As they battled their way towards [[Ronan the Accuser]], killing several [[Sakaarans]] who got in their way, they were eventually confronted by a team led by [[Korath]], who attempted to kill [[Star-Lord]] in order to prevent any of them from getting close to Ronan. While Drax battled the small army of Sakaaran soldiers, using both of [[Drax the Destroyer's Knives|his knives]] to rip them apart, Star-Lord was forced to battle the far stronger Korath, who easily overpowered the [[human]] despite his best efforts to keep fighting. [[File:KorathDeath.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax brutally kills [[Korath]]]] Once he had killed the soldiers, Drax then came to Quill's aid and personally engaged in a fierce battle against the strong [[Kree]] soldier. Eventually, Drax managed to pin his new enemy against a wall and proceeded to slay Korath by ripping out one of his cranial implants, electrocuting him to death before making a comment to Quill about whether or not he had successfully said a metaphor by remarking that a finger to the throat was the symbol of death. [[File:DraxStarLord-FunnySmile-GotG.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax watches [[Groot]] slaughter their enemies]] Just as Star-Lord considered correcting Drax on the meaning of a metaphor, they were attacked by another large team of Sakaarans sent by Ronan. Before they could engage in another battle against the soldier, Drax and Star-Lord then witnessed [[Groot (Original)|Groot]] massacre the entire team of Sakaarans with minimal effort as he extended his arm and impaled the soldiers. As Groot smashed the soldiers from wall to wall, Drax could not contain his glee at the slaughter. [[File:Drax-YouDidIt.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax mistakenly thinks Ronan is dead]] As they continued toward, they discovered that the door was still locked due to [[Gamora]] being busy battling against [[Nebula]]. Before long, however, the door was opened and the team charged inside to confront the Kree warmonger. Finding Ronan, the group attempted to kill him with the [[Hadron Enforcer]], which caused a massive explosion, much to Drax's delight. Ronan, however, survived and used his own hammer, the [[Universal Weapon]] to knock back the team. [[File:Drax-strangled-Ronan.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax is choked by [[Ronan the Accuser]]]] Still unwilling to allow Ronan to win, Drax charged forward to attack him, only for the powerful Kree to grab him by the throat and hold him high in the air, once again mocking Drax by noting how pitiful he found his [[Ovette|wife]] and [[Kamaria|daughter]]'s screams to be. Before Ronan could finish the group, [[Rocket]] suddenly crashed his ship through the ''[[Dark Aster]]'' and into both Ronan and Drax, causing both vehicles critical damage and almost killing Drax in the process. [[File:Drax-SavedByGroot-Sleeping.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax is saved from an explosion by [[Groot]]]] Drax was knocked unconscious in the crash, and it clearly became clear that the ''Dark Aster'' had lost all power and was crashing. In order to save his allies from certain death, Groot created a dome of wood out of his body to protect the team when the ''Dark Aster'' crashed into [[Xandar]]. Despite Rocket's insistence that Groot try and save himself when the ship crashed, the team were all saved, but Groot's body was pulverized into pieces.{{Ref|GotG}} ====Destroying Ronan==== [[File:DraxFiresHEnforcer.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax shoots Ronan with the [[Hadron Enforcer]]]] Just as the team recovered from the crash landing, it was discovered that [[Ronan the Accuser]] had also survived the crash as he prepared to destroy [[Xandar]] with the [[Infinity Stones|Infinity Stone]]. In a final desperate attempt to stop him, [[Star-Lord]] distracted Ronan while [[Rocket]] and Drax then used the [[Hadron Enforcer]] to blast Ronan's [[Universal Weapon]], exposing the [[Orb|Power Stone]] contained inside. [[File:Guardians-PurpleLightShow.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax absorbs some of the [[Orb]]'s power]] Quill quickly grabbed the stone but was nearly killed by its power. [[Gamora]] helped him by taking his hand and spreading the burden between the two of them. Drax did the same by grabbing onto Quill's shoulder, with [[Rocket]] following suite by gripping Drax's finger. Fortunately, [[Spider-Man]] was able to rescue Drax, Quill, and Nebula.{{Ref|AIW}} ====[[Snap|Thanos' Victory]]==== [[File:Drax Dies (Infinity War).png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax is a victim of the [[Snap]]]] {{Quote|Quill?|Drax to [[Star-Lord]]|Avengers: Infinity War}} As Drax and the others recovered and regrouped, [[Mantis]] alerted them that something was happening before [[Snap|disintegrating into dust]] suddenly, as they realized that [[Thanos]] had succeeded in his goal and completed placing all six of the [[Infinity Stones]] into the [[Infinity Gauntlet]]. Drax watched on in alarm, before calling out to [[Peter Quill]], as he disintegrated himself.{{Ref|AIW}} ====[[Battle of Earth]]==== [[File:Guardians of the Galaxy and Doctor Strange Return .png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax prepares to fight against [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate Thanos]]]] In [[2023]], as a result of the [[Blip]], Drax was restored to life. He, [[Mantis]], [[Peter Quill]] and [[Peter Parker]] were informed by [[Doctor Strange]] that five years had passed. Strange then used his [[Sling Ring]] to open an [[Inter-Dimensional Portal]] allowing them to arrive at the destroyed [[Avengers Compound]] on [[Earth]] to join the [[Battle of Earth|battle]] against an [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|alternate Thanos]] and his army. [[File:Korg Drax.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax repeatedly stabbing at [[Cull Obsidian/Cosmic Time Heist|Cull Obsidian]]]] During the battle, Drax saved [[Korg]] from [[Cull Obsidian/Cosmic Time Heist|Cull Obsidian]] by attacking from behind with his [[Drax the Destroyer's Knives|knives]] and allowing Korg to strike Obsidian. The battle ended when [[Tony Stark]] used the [[Infinity Stones]] to decimate alternate Thanos and his army at the cost of his own life.{{Ref|AE}} All the heroes, including Drax, then gathered around the fallen hero and knelt before him, out of respect for his sacrifice.{{Ref|AEDS}} As Drax had been wounded during the battle, he spilled his blood on the battlefield, which was collected by [[Nick Fury]]'s secret [[Skrull]] unit and placed into a vial known as the [[Harvest]] alongside other enhanced DNA samples. The Harvest vial was later administered by Super-Skrulls [[Gravik]] and [[G'iah]], granting them access to Drax's physiology and abilities.{{Ref|SI105}}{{Ref|SI106}} ===Return to Space=== ====Guardians Reunited==== [[File:Guardians of the Galaxy (Avengers Endgame).png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax attending [[Tony Stark]]'s funeral]] {{Quote|You should fight one another for the honor of leadership.|Drax to [[Peter Quill]] and [[Thor]]|Avengers: Endgame}} A week later, Drax and the reunited [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] attended [[Tony Stark]]'s funeral at Stark's [[Stark Eco-Compound|house]].{{Ref|AE}} Although content that Thanos was no more, Drax possibly still felt a bit unsatisfied that he was not the one who killed him; however, he honored Stark's sacrifice anyway.[https://www.gq.com/story/dave-bautista-interview Dave Bautista Can Do Anything] [[File:Drax (Avengers Endgame).png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax suggesting [[Peter Quill]] and [[Thor]] duel]] After the funeral, the Guardians decided to return to space. They obtained the ''[[Benatar]]'' again and flew to [[New Asgard]], [[Norway]] and waited for [[Thor]], who was joining them. Once they were all on board, there was a light interaction between [[Peter Quill]] and Thor in regards to who was in charge. Soon, the rest of the Guardians joined in, with Drax suggesting that they fight to decide who should be the leader of group, which the two shut down, but still left who was the leader unanswered.{{Ref|AE}} Drax's short time on [[Earth]] resulted in the citizens learning of his existence, and he was featured at the [[New Jersey AvengerCon]].{{Ref|MM101}} ====Adventures in the Galaxy==== [[File:Drax, Kraglin and Nebula.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax with the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]]]] Over the next several months, Drax and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] welcomed [[Kraglin Obfonteri]] into the team, while helping [[Thor]] lose weight and get back into shape. At one point, they let Thor pull the ''[[Benatar]]'' for strength training. During a journey to a swamp-filled planet, Drax and his teammates fought off swamp robotic creatures while Thor watched from his perch on a rock.{{Ref|TLaT}} ====[[Battle of Indigarr]]==== [[File:Nebula and Drax.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax fighting [[Booskans]] on [[Indigarr]]]] {{Quote|How are we doing, guys?"
"Terrible! We're all about to die!|[[Thor]] and Drax|Thor: Love and Thunder}} After [[Thor]]’s request, the Guardians traveled to [[Indigarr]], thinking it would be a "relaxing holiday", but ended up facing [[Habooska the Horrible]] and his army, they were also accompanied by [[Korg]], [[Thor]]'s friend. Taking cover from enemy fire, Drax then listened as Thor gave a speech to King [[Yakan]] of the [[Indigarrians]] and then single-handedly defeated Habooska and his army, accidentally destroying the [[Sacred Temple]] in the process. After saving the Indigarrians, Drax and the rest of the Guardians received the thanks of King Yakan.{{Ref|TLaT}} ====Answering Distress Calls==== [[File:Guardians (Thor 4).png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax sees [[Thor]] a final time before leaving]] {{Quote|Let's go."
"Take care of my [[Guardians of the Galaxy|crew]]. This is gonna be hard for them.|Drax and [[Thor]]|Thor: Love and Thunder}} At the ''[[Benatar]]'', Drax and the Guardians argued with Thor for bringing [[Toothgrinder]] and [[Toothgnasher]], as they ate control of the distress calls, with Drax stating that he loves the goats, as he tries to calm them down. Later, the Guardians watched the calls for help in horror, discovering that several gods were being killed by [[Gorr the God Butcher]]. Before answering the calls, the Guardians saw a distress call by [[Sif]]. Thor told them he needed to help her and the Guardians said goodbye to Thor before leaving.{{Ref|TLaT}} ===Operating from Knowhere=== ====Learning About Christmas==== [[File:Nebula, Drax, Kraglin & Mantis.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax alongside his allies in [[Knowhere]]]] {{Quote|Over the years, [[Peter Quill|Quill]] has talked about one person more than any other. A [[Kevin Bacon|legendary hero]] who has saved countless lives. We could give him to Quill as a present.|Drax to [[Mantis]]|The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special}} Sometime later, the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] had bought [[Knowhere]] from the [[Collector]] and decided to rebuild it so that it was liveable again after it had been destroyed by [[Thanos]]. They also acquired a new [[Bowie|ship]] as their main source of transportation, and were joined by [[Cosmo]], a [[Dogs|dog]] who they previously encountered on Knowhere in [[2014]].{{Ref|TGotGHS}} Like the rest of the Guardians, Drax moved into an [[Drax the Destroyer's Apartment|apartment]].{{Ref|GotGV3}} [[File:GOTG Holiday Special (10).png|250px|{{AltFloat}}|Drax having a conversation with [[Mantis]]]] In late [[2025]], Drax noticed how weird [[Peter Quill]] was acting. Drax agreed, saying how he hated that nobody died. Mantis then told Drax that she wanted to get Quill a present to make him feel better, reminding him of the secret only he knew, that she was Quill's sister. So Drax came up with the idea to get Quill the person he most admires as a present, [[Kevin Bacon]].{{Ref|TGotGHS}} ====Visiting Hollywood==== [[File:Drax & Mantis.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax and [[Mantis]] arrive back on [[Earth]]]] {{Quote|Come out and dance with us."
"Dancing is for people who are pathetic."
"Well, how about a drink then?|[[List of Minor Characters/Phase Four#The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special|Handsome Man]] and Drax|The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special}} Drax and [[Mantis]] set off to [[Earth]], to get [[Peter Quill]]'s hero, [[Kevin Bacon]]. As they entered [[Hollywood]], Mantis wondered why everyone was staring at them. [[File:Drax punches GoBot.png|{{AltFloat}}||Drax violently beating up a [[Cy-Kill|Go-Bot]]]] They touched down in [[Los Angeles]] and walked along the {{WPS|Hollywood Walk of Fame}}, where they saw many cosplayers. As Mantis continued posing for photos, Drax returned to the Gp-Bot and repeatedly punched him. [[File:GOTG Holiday Special (15).png|250px|{{AltFloat}}|Drax drinking along with the [[humans]]]] Later that night, they went to a bar to look for Bacon, and used their money to buy drinks. Drax and Mantis did shots together, and enjoyed them. As Mantis went off to dance, Drax stayed at the bar, where he was approached by a man who asked him to join them in dancing. Drax turned down the offer, thinking dancing was pathetic, and they instead did more shots at the bar. Mantis returned and they continued drinking until they ran out of money. As they sat outside now in a drunken state, Drax fell asleep as Mantis acquired them a map that gave directions to Bacon's [[Bacon Residence|house]].{{Ref|TGotGHS}} ====[[Kidnapping of Kevin Bacon|Kidnapping Kevin Bacon]]==== [[File:Drax meets Kevin Bacon.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax breaking into [[Kevin Bacon]]'s house]] {{Quote|You're coming with us! [[File:Drax (Los Angeles).png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax being shot at by the police officers]] They followed him outside, but on the way out, Drax realized he forgot the elf. Mantis incapacitated all of the officers, and Drax flipped over an incoming police car, which he enjoyed, and they went to find Bacon.{{Ref|TGotGHS}} ====Learning About Actors==== [[File:Drax disgusted.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax becomes disgusted by [[Kevin Bacon]]]] {{Quote|We got Quill the worst gift ever! "This is the worst day of my life!"
"We ruined Christmas worse than [[Yondu]]!|Drax and [[Mantis]]|The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special}} Eventually, [[Mantis]] finally got [[Kevin Bacon]] to go with them by mind-controlling him. Bacon told him that that was just a character. Together, Mantis and Drax realized that Bacon was merely an actor, causing Drax to get really mad. Mantis then controlled Bacon to act like a hero.{{Ref|TGotGHS}} ====Celebrating Christmas==== [[File:Drax Christmas sweater.jpeg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax happily celebrating Christmas]] {{Quote|It's [[Kevin Bacon]]. He's not a loser. He's great. They then unveiled [[Kevin Bacon]]. Quill's mood changed as he realized that they kidnapped Bacon. However, Drax did not realize how bad that was. [[Mantis]] removed the mind control, causing Bacon to run. [[File:Drax gets Christmas present.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax is gifted the elf stature from [[Earth]]]] However, Bacon soon came back, agreeing that they needed to learn about Christmas. He then sang along with [[Bzermikitokolok and the Knowheremen]]. During the celebration, Mantis gave Drax the elf statue he found at Kevin Bacon's house as a gift while [[Groot]] gave Drax his gift containing a wood carving of him flipping the police car, making him laugh. When the night was over, they group hugged with Bacon before he left for [[Earth]] with [[Kraglin Obfonteri]].{{Ref|TGotGHS}} ====[[Attack on Rocket|Attacked by Adam Warlock]]==== [[File:Mantis with Drax (Knowhere).png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax sees that [[Peter Quill]] has passed out]] {{Quote|Pick on someone your own size.|Drax to [[Adam Warlock]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Over the next few months, the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] continued working to rebuild [[Knowhere]] and turn it into a base of operations for the team. However, during this time, [[Peter Quill]] fell into a deep depression, still not over the loss of [[Gamora]]. One day, as Drax was working, [[Mantis]] asked him to dance with her, but he refused, continuing to insist that dancing was bad. Later, the Guardians discovered that Quill had passed out drunk once again, which both concerned and disappointed them, and they discussed the issue. [[File:GOTG Volume 3 Super Bowl Trailer (25).png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax fighting against [[Adam Warlock]]]] That night, [[Rocket]] was attacked by [[Adam Warlock]]. Drax joined the fight and lifted Adam before punching him in the face. Drax threw Adam around, but he flew back and the two grappled. Adam started to use his energy blasts, so Drax restrained his arms, but Adam was stronger and hit Drax. Knocked to the ground, Drax was unable to get up as Adam stood over him and viciously beat him. Drax was saved by [[Nebula]], who stabbed Adam in the chest, making Drax smile as the foe collapsed to the ground. Groot, who was rendered just a head in the fight, comforted Drax.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ===Saving Rocket=== ====[[Infiltration into the Orgoscope|Infiltrating the Orgoscope]]==== [[File:GotG Vol. 3 Trailer (43).png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax prepares to save [[Rocket]]'s life]] {{Quote|I mean, can't you see these authentic mechanic uniforms that we're wearing on our bodies? "Excuse my friend. He is the bosses nephew. To get through the [[Orgoscope]]'s shields, Drax accompanied [[Peter Quill]] and [[Mantis]] as they bypassed them, eating [[Zarg-Nut]]s, which he offered to Quill but not Mantis, which she yelled at him for. [[File:Ejected into space.png|{{AltFloat}}|The [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] descend onto the [[Orgoscope]]]] The Bowie was then boarded by the [[United Ravagers]], as [[Nebula]] had contacted the alternate [[Gamora/Cosmic Time Heist|Gamora]] to help them on their mission. While Nebula cut through the surface, Quill tried to talk privately to Gamora, but all of the Guardians could hear. [[File:Drax lying.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax helps to maintain the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]]' cover]] After getting inside, they were immediately discovered by Master [[Karja]], but they were able to maintain their cover, with Drax once again bringing up his distaste for the color of their uniforms. [[File:Drax cheers.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax cheers while fighting the [[Orgosentries]]]] Drax and Mantis found the spaceport, but they were surrounded by the [[Orgosentries]], so Mantis felt they should run, but Drax wanted to fight. The two were forced to fight, much to Drax's enjoyment, as he brawled with and threw several Orgosentries around, which he enthusiastically celebrated. They were saved by Quill who hacked the Orgosentries' suits, allowing them to escape on the ''Bowie''.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Visiting Counter-Earth==== [[File:Drax talks to quill.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax giving [[Peter Quill]] advice from [[Mantis]]]] {{Quote|I got a bad feeling about this."
"[[Peter Quill|Peter]] just told you to stay here."
"Yeah, well, that's his fault. He should know by now that I never do anything that anyone ever tells me.|Drax and [[Mantis]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} On the ''[[Bowie]]'', Drax recovered from his wounds and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] viewed [[Rocket]]'s file and witnessed the torture that he underwent at the hands of the [[High Evolutionary]]. [[File:Drax lying on the sofa.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax lying on a couch in [[Neelie's House]]]] Inside, Drax immediately laid his whole body on the couch, so the Guardians told him off for being rude, but Drax didn't understand what the problem was. Neelie pointed them towards [[Arête Laboratories]], so Quill told Drax and Mantis to stay and protect Rocket while the rest headed there, although Drax wanted to come along. [[File:Drax and Mantis.jpg|{{AltFloat}}|Drax tricking [[Mantis]] into leaving the ''[[Bowie]]'']] However, Drax did not like staying behind so he stole a motorcycle to take to Arête Laboratories. Mantis reminded him that Quill ordered them to protect Rocket, but Drax stated that he never did what he is told. Mantis was adamant on staying, so Drax tricked Mantis by claiming that he was only going to ride back to the ''[[Bowie]]''. Mantis got on the bike, and Drax headed straight to Arête Laboratories, which began to ascend right as the planet was being destroyed. [[Nebula]] contacted them to bring the ship to her, but Drax informed her they weren't with the ship, and she turned around to see the two of them behind her.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Captured by the High Evolutionary==== [[File:Guardians inside the arete.png|{{AltFloat}}|The [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] discover the [[Star Children]]]] {{Quote|It's not his fault he's stupid."

"He makes us laugh and he loves [[Guardians of the Galaxy|us]]. How is that a liability?|[[Mantis]] and [[Nebula]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} The three jumped onto [[Arête Laboratories]] but were unable to get inside as it ascended into space. Before the trio passed out from lack of oxygen, Drax was able to break down the door, where they discovered [[Star Children|children]] locked in cages. [[File:Mantis touching Drax.png|{{AltFloat}}|[[Mantis]] makes Drax forget what was said]] Drax celebrated saving them, but it was cut short by [[Nebula]] pushing him. [[File:Drax talks with Star Children.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax successfully talks to the [[Star Children]]]] They were found by some of the children that escaped, and realizing that Quill was heading to rescue them, they needed to stay clear of the starboard wall. Nebula questioned Drax on why he didn't say he knew the language, but Drax wondered why she never asked. [[File:Drax, Nebula and Mantis surrounded - Empire Exclusive.jpg|{{AltFloat}}| Drax, [[Nebula]] and [[Mantis]] see the [[Abilisks]]]] The walls of the pit them lifted, and the three found themselves surrounded by three [[Abilisks]]. However, when all hope seemed lost, Mantis stepped out and approached one of the Abilisks, reminding them that Abilisks only ate batteries, not people, and suspected the creatures were just scared. Drax and Nebula then watched as Mantis touched one of the Abilisks, which did not attack her, and she used her empathic powers to calm the creatures.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ====Fighting the High Evolutionary==== [[File:GOTG Volume 3 Super Bowl Trailer (17).png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax insists they save the [[Star Children]]]] {{Quote|And we need to be good joob joob."
"Huh?"
"It means friends.|Drax and [[Star-Lord]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} Drax, [[Nebula]] and [[Mantis]] were able to ride on the [[Abilisks]] through [[Arête Laboratories]]. They all noticed Rocket had headed off to save them, so the rest of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] followed his lead. [[File:Drax killing HellSpawn.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax violently ripping apart a [[Hell Spawn]]]] The Guardians entered a hallway filled with the [[High Evolutionary]]'s guards and [[Hell Spawn]], and as a team, they managed to successfully defeat every single enemy. Returning to the cages, Drax was reunited with [[Phyla]], and with the other Guardians' help, they were able to free the children and escort them to the hole that was connected to Knowhere and helped them get to the other side safely. [[File:Guardians defeat High Evolutionary.png|{{AltFloat}}|The [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] defeat the [[High Evolutionary]]]] Groot had saved [[Adam Warlock]] and brought him to Knowhere, and when he asked Groot why he saved him, Drax translated and told Adam that he said everyone deserves a second chance. When they noticed Rocket hadn't returned, the Guardians went searching and found him fighting the High Evolutionary. The rest of the Guardians joined in, with Drax slamming his body to the ground and punching him into the air. Once defeated, Drax urged Rocket to kill him, but he instead spared the High Evolutionary. The Guardians rushed back to Knowhere with the caged animals,{{Ref|GotGV3}} and Drax carried the High Evolutionary just before the ship exploded.[https://twitter.com/JamesGunn/status/1659608908913336322 James Gunn on Twitter - May 19, 2023] ===Leaving the Guardians=== ====Raising the Star Children==== [[File:Drax Vol 3.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax learns that [[Mantis]] is leaving the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|team]]]] {{Quote|Drax. I need you here. We're building a [[Knowhere|new society]]. I need all the support I can get for those [[Star Children|children]] out there.|[[Nebula]] to Drax|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} In the aftermath of the [[Attack on Arête Laboratories|battle]], the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] were summoned together and listened to [[Peter Quill]] reveal that he was leaving the team and returning to [[Earth]]. [[Mantis]] also revealed that she was leaving, wanting to go out on her own. Drax said he would join her, feeling that he needed to protect her, but Mantis objected. [[File:Drax the Dad.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax agrees to look after the [[Star Children]]]] [[Nebula]] interrupted to tell Drax that she needed him to stay on [[Knowhere]], as she had a lot to deal with creating a new society, and the [[Star Children]] were going to need someone to take care of them. Nebula acknowledged that she finally saw who Drax really was, stating that he was not meant to be "The Destroyer," but was always born to be a father. Drax was touched by Nebula's words and accepted the responsibility. With everyone going their separate ways, [[Rocket Raccoon]] thought the Guardians were over, but Quill appointed him captain, and the others saluted the new leader. [[File:Drax dancing.png|{{AltFloat}}|Drax dances for the first time on [[Knowhere]]]] They all then exited the bar, where Drax went to see Mantis off before she departed. Drax and Mantis shared a look at each other, with Drax tearing up to see his best friend leave. The two waved goodbye to each other, and Drax watched as Mantis walked away along with the three [[Abilisks]] she rescued. Rocket had played music through the speakers on Knowhere and all the citizens were dancing, so some of the children dragged Drax to the festivities. Although he had never danced before due to disliking it, Drax joined in, laughing giddily and letting out a loud cheer as he celebrated their victory.{{Ref|GotGV3}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|Ha! You're lucky I was able to knock down that door with my incredible strength.|Drax the Destroyer|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} *'''Superhuman Strength''': [[File:Drax the Destroyer vs. Adam Warlock.png|thumb|250px|Drax lifting Adam one-handed]] Drax has much more physical prowess than most species, being able to lift the bulk weight, break through stone and metal with ease, and rip machines in half with his bare hands. Using his brute strength alone, ripped off pieces of [[Groot (Original)|Groot]], and pulled out [[Korath]]'s cybernetic implant from his head. His strength has allowed him to overpower many enemies and toss them aside, to the point where he could easily restrain [[Gamora]] with one hand, brawl with Groot and effortlessly take out most of Ronan's forces. While escaping prison, Drax was capable of easily ripping a Kyln security drone in half. He was also able to match and eventually overpower the cybernetically augmented Kree Korath. The strength of Drax also extends to his legs, allowing him to jump great heights at a single leap; he was able to catch a drone several feet off the ground with a single leap, and also was able to jump several meters to attack [[Ronan the Accuser]] and later did the same to begin his battle with Thanos. Despite his incredible strength, Drax was easily beaten half to death by Ronan, although he could still fight against him for a time, and was effortlessly overpowered by [[Thanos]], who had no problem parrying Drax's knife attacks and knocking him out with a single punch that Drax could not deflect even with his knives, although he managed to injure Thanos slightly on the leg using his knives when he had him off-guard as well as with aid from [[Doctor Strange]]'s [[Eldritch Whip]]s, [[Spider-Man]]'s [[Synthetic Webbing|web]], and Star-Lord's [[Gravity Mine]] fired from his blaster, Drax even managed to restrain Thanos long enough for [[Mantis]] to briefly subdue him so Iron Man and Spider-Man may attempt to pull the [[Infinity Gauntlet]] from his left arm. Drax can also throw his knives with immense force, enough to pierce Doctor Strange's twin [[Tao Mandalas]]. Aboard the ''[[Benatar]]'', Drax was the one designated to restrain the rambunctious [[Toothgnasher]]. While kidnapping [[Kevin Bacon]], Drax threw Mantis over his gate in order to infiltrate his home. He then proceeded to smash through Bacon's window. Later, he also flipped over a police car with little force. During the [[Attack on Rocket]], Drax was able to throw [[Adam Warlock]] into a wall and his punches were doing damage to Adam's durable skin. To save the [[Star Children]], Drax easily broke metal cages. In the [[Infiltration into the Orgoscope]], Drax fought off several soldiers, knocking them out easily and throwing them at great distances. Drax also managed to break down a huge door before being frozen in space. In the [[Attack on Arête Laboratories]], Drax forcefully opened a metal door to enter the battle, managing to throw several humanoid soldiers and even [[Hell Spawn]]s at great distances. He managed to easily rip out the guts of one Hell Spawn. *'''Superhuman Durability''': [[File:Draxdestroyingamachine.png|thumb|250px|Drax withstanding machine gunfire]] Drax can withstand attacks that most species cannot. Drax has withstood a beating from Ronan the Accuser, who sent Drax flying several dozen feet through a metal wall. Also in the Guardians' battle with Ronan aboard the ''[[Dark Aster]]'', Drax was able to survive the impact of Rocket's [[M-Ships|M-Ship]] crashing into him, although he was knocked unconscious, and sustained no injuries when he was set on fire and flung against several trees as the ''[[Milano]]'' crashed onto [[Berhert]] while he was tethered to the outside of the ship. Drax had even survived being smashed to the ground when the [[Abilisk]]'s tentacles grabbed him and later during the [[Battle on Ego's Planet]], Drax effortlessly landed on his feet completely unharmed after falling from the [[Construction Drilling Vessel]]. Drax's skin is much denser than average and is thus impact resistant and difficult to be cut with bladed and piercing weapons.{{Ref|MSCE}} Due to this, Drax was able to withstand being accidentally pierced by a [[Yaka Arrow]] by [[Kraglin Obfonteri]]. He also can easily survive falls from great heights and land on his feet. Drax was even able to withstand a powerful blow from [[Thanos]] himself, which knocked him through stones, and then was able to withstand being hurled off Thanos and quickly recover to attempt to battle him again alongside Nebula and Quill, surviving a powerful shockwave from the [[Power Stone]], although it knocked him out for a while. However, Drax has his limits, as both [[Mantis]] and [[Doctor Strange]] doubted he could withstand a point-blank blast to his face from [[Iron Man]]'s [[Iron Man Armor: Mark L|nanotech suit]]. He also easily withstood gunshots from police officers and even laughed, remarking at how it tickled. While distracted, Drax survived two shots from Master [[Karja]]'s gun, but was injured. In the [[Attack on Arête Laboratories]], Drax was able to withstand the quantum blast of an [[Abilisks|Abilisk]] and easily tanked a hit from a Hell Spawn, who are creatures capable of destroying entire buildings. *'''Superhuman Agility''': [[File:GotGV2 17Days 17.png|thumb|250px|Drax leaping towards [[Abilisk]]]] Drax has a higher level of agility than most others, leaping great distances or great heights with precision.{{Ref|MSCE}} He was able to precisely take down enemies, such as leaping onto a Kyln guard's shoulder to kick a guard behind him. He jumped many feet into an [[Abilisk]]'s mouth. He was also able to jump at [[Thanos]] and successfully strike him with his knives, and later easily leap onto [[Cull Obsidian]]'s back. Drax also easily jumped over the gate of [[Bacon Residence|Kevin Bacon's house]] and later chased him in the street leaping at great heights alongside [[Mantis]]. In the [[Battle of Counter-Earth]], Drax jumps a great distance to reach the High Evolutionary's ship alongside Mantis and Nebula. During the [[Attack on Arête Laboratories]], Drax managed to leap across the room to fight a Hell Spawn. *'''Superhuman Stamina''': Drax can fight alongside the rest of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] for great periods of time. He fought [[Thanos]] without any visible tiring and even fought an alternate [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]] along with his entire [[Chitauri|army]]. *'''Regenerative Healing Factor''': Drax's cells regenerate much faster than most species. During his fight with Ronan, Drax suffered several bruises and cuts on his face; however, when he was removed from the yellow liquid tank, he was completely healed. In particular, Drax's skin cells have a drastically higher regenerative rate than his other cells, allowing him to recover from superficial and light wounds faster.{{Ref|MSCE}} ===Abilities=== {{Quote|You know who I am, yes?"
"You're Drax. The Destroyer."
"And you know why they call me this?"
"You slayed dozens of [[Ronan]]'s minions.|Drax and [[Moloka Dar]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} *'''Expert Combatant''': [[File:Draxfightingguards.png|thumb|250px|Drax attacking the guards]] Drax has proven to be a brutal, yet accomplished combatant, able to overpower multiple opponents, including several Kyln guards and [[Sakaaran]] warriors with little effort. Drax was also capable of fighting equally with the highly trained and cybernetically enhanced Kree [[Korath]], eventually managing to kill him. However, Drax was easily outmatched by [[Ronan the Accuser]] despite lasting better than most against the Kree General and despite engaging him with Doctor Strange, was swiftly beaten by Thanos, who effortlessly knocked him out with a single blow before he overwhelmed Strange, too. Drax held his own for the longest amount of time against [[Adam Warlock]], who was able to make quick work of [[Nebula]] and [[Mantis]]. {{Quote|I would not slice [[Ronan the Accuser|his]] throat. I would cut his head clean off.|Drax to [[Peter Quill]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} *'''Knife Mastery''': [[File:DraxTheDestroyer-KillsTwoSakaarans.jpg|thumb|250px|Drax tossing [[Sakaaran]] soldiers]] Drax is highly skilled in using knives, particularly his own dual knives, that he used to take down many Sakaaran soldiers and even land a strike on Thanos and fight against the Titan alongside Strange using a sword made of Eldritch Magic, although only briefly. He can also skillfully throw his knives. *'''Expert Marksman''': Drax was able to use the [[Hadron Enforcer]] to accurately shoot and destroy Ronan's [[Universal Weapon]] once Rocket repaired it, exposing the Power Stone and allowing the Guardians to defeat Ronan. Using a blaster, Drax was additionally able to shoot down [[Zylak]]'s [[Omnicrafts|Omnicraft]] mid-flight. Drax could also accurately throw his [[Drax the Destroyer's Knives|dual knives]], as he almost hit [[Doctor Strange]] if not for his Tao Mandalas. In the [[Battle of Indigarr]], Drax used guns to shoot at the [[Booskans]]. *'''Pilot''': Drax was able to co-pilot the ''[[Bowie]]'', along with [[Mantis]], as they made their way to [[Knowhere]] after kidnapping [[Kevin Bacon]]. {{Quote|[[Star Children|They]]'re gonna tell the other kids to stay away from the starboard wall."
"Why didn't you tell us you knew their [[Orbose|language]] this whole time?"
"Why didn't you ask?|Drax and [[Nebula]]|Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3}} *'''Multilingualism''': Drax is fluent in his native language and he can understand [[Groot]] after spending years connecting with him. He also speaks [[Orbose]], despite the language being inaccessible by a [[Translator Implant]]. ==Equipment== ===Weapons=== {{Quote|I like your knife. I'm keeping it.|Drax to [[Moloka Dar]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} *'''[[Drax the Destroyer's Knives|Dual Knives]]''': [[File:Drax the Destroyer (2018).jpg|thumb|250px|Drax the Destroyer wielding his [[Drax the Destroyer's Knives|Dual Knives]]]] Drax's weapons of choice are two knives which he often takes into battle. Due to his main knives being taken away by the [[Kyln]] guards, Drax briefly used [[Moloka Dar]]'s knives until he got his own back. He then used the knives to battle [[Ronan the Accuser]] during the [[Skirmish on Knowhere]] as well as fighting against the [[Sakaarans]] during the [[Battle of Xandar]], using them for both close-quarters combat as well as using them as throwing knives. He continued to use them alongside the Guardians, notably when he attempted to stab the [[Abilisk]] to death, but to no avail. Drax armed himself with his knives when he prepared to confront [[Thanos]] on [[Knowhere]], but he was quickly stopped in his tracks when Thanos altered his biology with the [[Reality Stone]]. He used the knives as a part of Quill's plan to incapacitate Thanos on [[Titan]], slashing his legs with them. Though he disappeared from the [[Snap]], Drax kept his knives after the [[Blip]] and used them to stab [[Cull Obsidian/Cosmic Time Heist|Cull Obsidian]] during the [[Battle of Earth]]. {{Quote|The lunatic on top of this [[Milano|craft]] is holding a [[Hadron Enforcer]]. It's a weapon of my own design.|[[Rocket]]|Guardians of the Galaxy (film)}} *'''[[Hadron Enforcer]]''': [[File:Hadron Enforcer Drax2.png|thumb|250px|Drax holding the [[Hadron Enforcer]]]] Drax used the [[Hadron Enforcer]], invented by [[Rocket]] to intimidate the [[Yondu Ravager Clan|Ravagers]] into freeing both [[Star-Lord]] and [[Gamora]] from their custody, although they were freed before he could fire. Drax later used the weapon against [[Ronan the Accuser]] during the [[Battle of Xandar]]. *'''[[Power Stone]]''': During their [[Battle of Xandar|final battle]] with [[Ronan the Accuser]], Drax and the other [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] used the [[Power Stone]] in tandem to direct the Stone's energy at Ronan, destroying his body and killing him. *'''[[Energy Cannon]]''': Drax used an [[Energy Cannon]] to destroy a [[Sovereign]] [[Omnicrafts|Omnicraft]] piloted by [[Zylak]]. ===Other Equipment=== *'''[[Holographic Space Suits|Holographic Space Suit]]''': Drax put on a space suit while the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] were being [[Escape from the Sovereign Fleet|chased]] by a [[Sovereign]] fleet. He used the suit to breathe while he tethered himself to the Guardians' ship and went into space, shooting [[Zylak]]'s ship. *'''[[Translator Implant]]''': Drax has a translator implant that helps him understand many of the languages spoken in the universe.[https://twitter.com/JamesGunn/status/1639784535884984322?s=20 James Gunn on Twitter - March 25, 2023] *'''[[Aero-Rigs]]''': [[File:GotGV2 Greatest Pilot 7.png|thumb|250px|Drax using the Aero-Rigs]] Drax used one of Rocket's jet-pack like devices to seamlessly fly through the air while carrying Mantis to safety. *'''[[Space Suit]]''': A special suit used to survive in the vacuum of space. Drax and the other [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] used the suits until [[Mantis]] accidentally threw them away. ===Vehicles=== *'''''[[Milano]]''''': [[File:GotGV2 Sovereign Fleet 2.png|thumb|250px|Drax aboard the ''Milano'']] Drax and the rest of the future [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] used the ''Milano'' to [[Escape from the Kyln|escape]] the [[Kyln]], and used it to travel to [[Knowhere]], hoping to sell the [[Orb]]. Drax, [[Rocket]], and [[Groot]] later used the ''Milano'' to threaten the [[Ravagers]], hoping to get [[Peter Quill]] and [[Gamora]] saved. Drax and the rest of the Guardians crashed ''Milano'' into [[Ronan the Accuser]]'s [[Dark Aster|ship]], and it was later repaired as the Guardians began using it as their base of operations, where Drax sharpened his knife, getting distracted by [[Groot]] dancing. Drax was in the ship while Quill and Rocket piloted it away from a [[Sovereign]] fleet following the theft of the Sovereign's [[Anulax Batteries]], and Drax tethered himself to the ship while jumping out into space to defend it. However, the ship then crashed on [[Berhert]], and Drax left it on the planet to go to [[Ego]]'s planet. *'''''[[Eclector]]''''': Drax boarded the ''Eclector'' following [[Peter Quill]] and [[Gamora]]'s abduction by the [[Ravagers]]. The [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] all met on the ship and discussed [[Ronan the Accuser]]'s possession of the [[Orb]], all agreeing to stop Ronan. Drax and the rest of the Guardians prepared for battle and shared their plan with the Ravagers on the ship. **'''[[Quadrant]]''': [[File:GotGV2 17Days 3.png|thumb|250px|Drax aboard the ''Quadrant'']] Drax fled the [[Battle on Ego's Planet]] onto a quadrant of the ''[[Eclector]]'', bringing [[Mantis]] with him. The rest of the Guardians made it to the quadrant safely, except for [[Yondu Udonta]], who sacrificed himself for Quill. Drax and the other Guardians mourned Udonta in the Quadrant and held a funeral for him, watching as other [[Ravagers|Ravager clans]] came together and held a Ravagers' funeral for him. *'''''[[Dark Aster]]''''': Drax and the rest of the [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] broke into the ''[[Dark Aster]]'' and fought their way through several guards, eventually reaching [[Ronan the Accuser]], who Drax began fighting. The ship began to fall apart and crash, so [[Groot]] covered Drax and the others with his own body, sacrificing himself for the team. *'''[[Ego's Ship]]''': [[Ego]] brought Drax, [[Peter Quill]], and [[Gamora]] to his planet using his ship. While on the ship, Drax and Quill made a bet about what [[Mantis]]' antennae were for, and they discussed Mantis' ability to read people's emotions. Drax enjoyed Mantis revealing Quill's were for, and Mantis joined Drax's enjoyment. Mantis also explained that she could people to sleep, and demonstrated her ability on Drax at his own request. *'''[[Construction Drilling Vessel]]''': Drax and the other [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] boarded a laser drill and used it to go to [[Ego]]'s core, hoping to destroy it and kill the [[Celestial]]. However, the ship got a hole in the bottom, which Drax fell out of. *'''''[[Benatar]]''''': [[File:Infinity War 151.jpg|thumb|250px|Drax aboard the ''Benatar'']] The [[Guardians of the Galaxy]] used the ''Benatar'' following the destruction of the ''[[Milano]]''. They responded to a distress call on the ship, causing the team to meet [[Thor]] and learn that [[Thanos]] was looking for the [[Infinity Stones]]. Drax took the ''Benatar'' to [[Knowhere]], hoping to stop Thanos from getting the [[Reality Stone]] there, but failed. Drax and the team then took the ship to [[Titan]], where they again confronted Thanos and Drax was killed in the [[Snap]]. [[2023|Five years later]], Drax returned and helped defeat [[Thanos/Cosmic Time Heist|Thanos]], and the team again took off in the ''Benatar'', leaving Earth with Thor. * '''''[[Bowie]]''''': [[File:Mantis & Drax the Destroyer.png|thumb|250px|Drax and [[Mantis]] in the ''[[Bowie]]'']] In [[2025|December 2025]], Drax and [[Mantis]] used the ''Bowie'' to go to [[Earth]] to kidnap [[Kevin Bacon]]. Both of them later returned to [[Knowhere]] with Bacon. In the following year, Drax and the [[Guardians of the Galaxy|Guardians]] used the ''Bowie'' to help find information to operate on [[Rocket]]. ==Facilities== *'''[[Knowhere]]''': ''To be added'' ===Prisons=== *'''[[Kyln]]''': [[File:Drax (2014).jpg|thumb|250px|Drax standing in the [[Kyln]]]] Drax was imprisoned in the [[Kyln]] for 22 counts of murder and five counts of grievous bodily harm.
